title: Roblox Stock Investors Activity and Sentiment
text: Roblox investor sentiment is very positive, according to TipRanks data from January 2025. Roblox stock investors allocate an average of 3.62% to RBLX, based on 825,071 active investor portfolios. More recently, despite significant stock price declines, retail sentiment on Stocktwits turned extremely bullish from bullish a day earlier, with message volumes on the platform soaring nearly 1,600% over a 24-hour period. However, chatter was mixed, with one user urging buying the dip, while another user expected the stock to drop further. The stock has declined nearly 32% so far in 2026, following heavy selling pressure after the company lowered its full-year 2026 bookings guidance from $8.28 billion to $8.55 billion down to $7.33 billion to $7.6 billion. The retail investor sentiment appears to show a contrarian buy the dip mentality despite recent headwinds, though investor opinions remain divided on the stock's near-term direction.
